operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: IDF Kills Nine in Gaza Strikes on Passover Day 2; Famine Imminent as Crossings Stay Closed; ICJ Genocide Case Advances
heroSubtitle: Israeli drones killed nine Palestinians in simultaneous strikes on Mawasi, Jabalia, and Khan Younis on April 2; UNRWA SitRep #214 documents 571,000 in emergency hunger conditions and 18,000 awaiting medical evacuation as all land crossings remain closed since Feb 28; ICJ advances genocide case after Israel submits counter-memorial and six states intervene; cumulative Gaza death toll 72,285+ with 680+ killed since Oct 2025 ceasefire; 2026 Flash Appeal 93% unfunded
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,285+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / WAFA, Mar 31 2026). ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803. UNDP shipments suspended Mar 25, 2026 after contraband discovery. Lancet Mortality Survey: 75,200 violent deaths through Jan 5, 2025. Houthis resumed missile attacks on Israel March 30 (first since Oct 2025 ceasefire) — third barrage April 1. ICJ: Israel filed counter-memorial Mar 13–14; Netherlands, Iceland, Namibia, Hungary, USA, and Fiji filed interventions March 2026; Mar 22 ICJ order on basic needs/UNRWA unimplemented. UNRWA SitRep #214 (Apr 1–2): 571,000 in emergency hunger conditions, 18,000 await medical evacuation, 101,000+ children face acute malnutrition. IDF struck Mawasi, Jabalia, Khan Younis on Apr 2 killing 9.
